headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 6, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless baseball. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save. The Los Angeles Dodgers cruised to a 12-2 win over the Houston Astros, behind a historic performance from Andy Pages, who hit three home runs and drove in six runs. The San Diego Padres secured a 5-1 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Matt Waldron earning the win.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Chris Devenski of the Pittsburgh Pirates, who was placed on the 15-day injured list due to an undisclosed illness. Matthew Boyd of the Chicago Cubs was also placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 4, 2026, with a left meniscus injury. The Cincinnati Reds have placed Emilio Pagán on the 15-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred Brandon Williamson to the 60-day injured list with left shoulder fatigue.

The Minnesota Twins acquired Yoendrys Gómez from the Tampa Bay Rays in exchange for cash. The Chicago White Sox received Trevor Richards from the Philadelphia Phillies in a trade for cash. The Atlanta Braves traded Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash, while the Washington Nationals traded Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out Blue Jays 3-0**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless baseball. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Cardinals 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-2 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, with Andrew Vaughn leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Aaron Ashby earned the win for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Blast Astros 12-2 in Dominant Victory**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers cruised to a 12-2 win over the Houston Astros, behind a historic performance from Andy Pages. Pages hit three home runs and drove in six runs, including a key homer on a fly ball to left field.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Giants 5-1**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres secured a 5-1 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Matt Waldron earning the win. Xander Bogaerts led the Padres' offense with a home run and 2 RBI.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Rangers 9-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers in a lopsided 9-2 victory, handing the Rangers their loss. Brandon Nimmo and Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense, while Ezequiel Duran and Ryan McMahon contributed for the Rangers.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Twins 7-5**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, handing the Twins their loss. Impact hitters for both teams included Ryan Jeffers and Brooks Lee for the Twins, and Keibert Ruiz for the Nationals.

top_news.title: **Pirates Place Devenski on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Pittsburgh Pirates right-hander Chris Devenski has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to an undisclosed illness. The move was made on May 7, 2026.

top_news.title: **Gómez Heads North: Twins Acquire RHP Yoendrys Gómez**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Yoendrys Gómez from the Tampa Bay Rays in exchange for cash.
